title: Masterplast Hypoallergenic Plasters, Flexible, Durable, White, 100 Counts
features: HYPOALLERGENIC: Masterplast Hypoallergenic Plasters, kind to sensitive skin, made from a comfortable hypoallergenic, flexible material avoiding irritation
PROTECT: Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, suitable for protecting minor cuts, grazes and wounds
LONG LASTING: Providing long lasting gentle protection. Flexible, durable top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals:
ASSORTED SIZES: Includes 100 plasters in four sizes
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 100 Plasters
description: Product Description Masterplast Hypoallergenic Plasters, kind to sensitive skin, made from a comfortable hypoallergenic, flexible material avoiding irritation. Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, suitable for protecting minor cuts, grazes and wounds. Box of 100 Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, and secure it in place.
